allow: Bash(perl -i -pe 's/traitNames, acl := p\\.parseTraitUse\\\(\\\)/traitNames, aliases, acl := p.parseTraitUse\(\)/' parser/trait_parser.go)

Bash(perl -i -0777 -pe 's/if p\\.current\\\(\\\)\\.Type\\\(\\\) == token\\.USE \\{\\s*\\n\\s*traitNames, aliases, acl := p\\.parseTraitUse\\\(\\\)\\s*\\n\\s*if acl != nil \\{\\s*\\n\\s*return nil, acl\\s*\\n\\s*\\}\\s*\\n\\s*acl = p\\.mergeTraitsIntoMaps\\\(traitNames/if p.current\(\).Type\(\) == token.USE {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\ttraitNames, aliases, acl := p.parseTraitUse\(\)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif acl != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, acl\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\ttraitAliases = append\(traitAliases, aliases...\)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tacl = p.mergeTraitsIntoMaps\(traitNames, traitAliases/' parser/trait_parser.go)
